summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The artifact marks this as a mixed PR inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster, so no shared canonical is selected. No close, merge, fix, or GitHub mutation is planned. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; unrelated non-security PRs are classified independently.
